mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 4% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite elevated unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and housing starts indicate weakening supply-side activity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive when both INDPRO and HOUST decline by > 1.5% sequentially.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation (CPIAUCSL > 2.5%) amplifies the negative impact of rising interest rates on equity valuations, producing sharper S&P 500 declines during monetary tightening cycles.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly more negative in high-inflation periods despite rising FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS > 150k) signals robust labor market demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative despite PAYEMS growth above 150k.

mechanism_narrative: Weak housing starts (HOUST < 1400k) reflect deteriorating consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when HOUST falls below 1400k.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in retail sales (RSAFS) and GDP (GDPC1) signal broad-based demand destruction, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive when both RSAFS and GDPC1 decline by > 1% sequentially.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in industrial production (INDPRO < 104) during a supply shock regime indicates production bottlenecks, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in 60%+ of instances when INDPRO declines by > 1.5%.
